title: fix(deps): update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl to v1.3.0
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl (github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl)</summary>

### [`v1.3.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/releases/tag/v1.3.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.2.1...v1.3.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Add maintainers file by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/137](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/137)
-   chore(deps): Bump github.com/spf13/cobra from 1.8.0 to 1.8.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/136](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/136)
-   make: drop check-go-version target by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/139](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/139)
-   ci: use codecov-action to upload coverage report by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/138](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/138)
-   ci: update codecov-action from v3 to v4 by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/140](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/140)
-   Add new logo by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/143](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/143)
-   memparse: add search functionality to memparse by [@​behouba](https://redirect.github.com/behouba) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/141](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/141)
-   Fix location of Open Files in tree by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/144](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/144)
-   readme: add codecov badge by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/145](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/145)
-   Upgrade GitHub Actions versions to remove deprecation warnings by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/146](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/146)
-   Upgrade more GitHub Actions versions to remove deprecation warnings by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/147](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/147)
-   Add option to print metadata information by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/148](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/148)
-   Recursively add metadata JSON fields to the tree by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/149](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/pull/149)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/checkpointctl/compare/v1.2.1...v1.3.0

</details>
